## Schema.method() method

Adds an instance method to the schema

**Signature:**

```typescript
method<K extends keyof TInstanceMethods>(name: K, func: InjectFunctionContext<RawDocType & TVirtualProperties & TInstanceMethods, TInstanceMethods[K]>): this;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

name


</td><td>

K


</td><td>

name of the method


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

func


</td><td>

[InjectFunctionContext](./iodm.injectfunctioncontext.md)<!-- -->&lt;RawDocType &amp; TVirtualProperties &amp; TInstanceMethods, TInstanceMethods\[K\]&gt;


</td><td>

function implementation of the method


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

this

schema instance for chaining

## Example


```ts
const userSchema = new Schema({
 firstName: String,
 lastName: String,
});

userSchema.method('getFullName', function() {
 return `${this.firstName} ${this.lastName}`;
});
```
